task_completion.description: Agent transfers aircraft from Valley UAV Logistics to Summit Drone Services.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent editing aircraft records and changing the assigned operator/company from 'Valley UAV Logistics' to 'Summit Drone Services'.

task_completion.description: Agent transfers personnel from Valley UAV Logistics to Summit Drone Services.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent editing personnel/staff records and changing the assigned operator/company from 'Valley UAV Logistics' to 'Summit Drone Services'.

task_completion.description: Summit Drone Services has all 5 aircraft assigned to it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Aircraft list view showing exactly 5 aircraft, all with 'Summit Drone Services' listed as the operator/owner.

task_completion.description: Summit Drone Services has all 3 personnel assigned to it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Personnel/Staff list view showing exactly 3 personnel, all with 'Summit Drone Services' listed as the operator/owner.

task_completion.description: Valley UAV Logistics company record is deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A deletion confirmation screen for 'Valley UAV Logistics', or the Companies/Operators list view showing that 'Valley UAV Logistics' is no longer present while 'Summit Drone Services' remains.

integrity.description: Agent used the web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the Aerobridge web interface in a browser. No terminal windows executing database commands, SQL, or Python scripts should be used to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open or used to modify the page's HTML/text to simulate a successful merge.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely deleted the company using the application's functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks a 'Delete' button and confirms the deletion on a confirmation page, rather than just navigating away or hiding the element.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Source Company: Valley UAV Logistics (initially 3 aircraft, 2 personnel). Target Company: Summit Drone Services (initially 2 aircraft, 1 personnel). Final expected state: Summit Drone Services must have exactly 5 aircraft and 3 personnel. Valley UAV Logistics must be deleted.
